blessing.cure_zombie_villager.lore: I was heartbroken when I saw a Villager succumb to the infection. I'll do my best to find a way to cure them.
blessing.cure_zombie_villager.name: Plague Doctor
divine_action.healing_blossom.decorate_s: Decorate a shrine with 18 unique flowers
divine_action.healing_blossom.grow_ambro: Convert a Berry Bush into an Ambrosia Bush
divine_action.healing_touch.bless_shrine: Bless a shrine with a Divine Phial
divine_action.healing_touch.heal_mob_to_: Heal any non-hostile mob to full
divine_action.healing_touch.use_blessed_: Heal your wounds with Blessed Bandages.
guide.DECEPTION.cursed_rune.boss_lore: I didn't realize just how many words of power there are. I jotted down a few keywords to try out, but there's got to be a litany of others out there.
guide.DECEPTION.cursed_rune.lore: If words are power, that must mean I can use that power to my advantage. I'll write down some notes to see which words have the most impact.
guide.DECEPTION.flicker.boss_lore: This short range teleport spell is a bit tricky to get the hang of, especially when going backwards, but it's a good start.
guide.DECEPTION.flicker.lore: I don't always have a means to attack or defend myself. Sometimes I just need a way to dodge and get out of the way!
guide.DECEPTION.purge_magic.boss_lore: This is good progress. This won't hurt anyone, but this should be a super effective a way to dispel my enemies spells in a pinch.
guide.DECEPTION.purge_magic.lore: I've learned to excel in sneaking, but when I'm caught, I'm finding my self too vulnerable. I need to find a way to turn the tides, and quick.
guide.DECEPTION.shadowbond.boss_lore: Well that has done the trick! As soon as they passed the traps, I swapped places with them. Let's just hope they don't track me down.
guide.DECEPTION.shadowbond.lore: Someone has requested my help turning them invisible so they can sneak into a jungle temple's vault. If only I could reverse our roles...
guide.DIVINE.blessing.boss_lore: I think I covered all my bases. From now painful injuries, starvation, disease, and more, I'll be able to help anyone in need.
guide.DIVINE.blessing.lore: When travelling with a group or companion, there's been too many times I've been unable to tend their wounds. I must remedy this immediately.
guide.DIVINE.healing_blossom.boss_lore: I managed to grow a new kind of flower by imbuing one with some of my Divine energy. I can feel it emitting a healing aura when I'm around.
guide.DIVINE.healing_blossom.lore: The Divines didn't just make sentient creatures, but also plants. I wonder if my borrowed power can be used for flora.
guide.DIVINE.healing_touch.boss_lore: It works perfectly. After sustaining an attack, self inflicted or otherwise, I can channel the Divine energy to heal myself.
guide.DIVINE.healing_touch.lore: The power of the Divines is one in which harm to living creatures is seen as a sin. Does that mean I can use this power for the opposite?
guide.DIVINE.siphon.boss_lore: Not only was I right, but this dark power has proven to be quite useful. I can use it to drain the life force of my enemies.
guide.DIVINE.siphon.lore: Sin is just another tool used by the Divines. That must mean that too is a power that I can harness myself.
guide.RUIN.electric_charge.boss_lore: I'm certain this will work... This spell should be able to start building up shock charge on my target before they knew what hit them.
guide.RUIN.electric_charge.lore: I don't think I'm powerful enough to take people head on right now. I need to give my self an advantage before the fight starts.
guide.RUIN.fireball.boss_lore: This is outstanding! I can now focus my energy to create a ball of fire that will burn through anything in its path and then some.
guide.RUIN.fireball.lore: Every Magi should have this classic spell in their arsenal. But to truly unlock its potential, I need to understand how to control the flow of energy.
guide.RUIN.flame_jet.boss_lore: If I concentrate all of my energy to a point in front of me, I can release it as a burst of flame. I just know there are plenty of applications for this!
guide.RUIN.flame_jet.lore: As a magic user, I'm pretty vulnerable at close range. I need a better way to handle enemies that get too close, that way I can protect myself on all fronts.
guide.RUIN.shattering_crystal.boss_lore: All it came down to was the right element. Using the Frost's innate power to slow things down, I can delay the burst for as long as I want
guide.RUIN.shattering_crystal.lore: My attacks are becoming too predictable. I wonder if I can make a spell with a delayed attack. No one will see it coming!
guide.RUIN.solar_ray.boss_lore: I was mistaken... This spell isn't channelling energy from the sun, but a Sun God! That's definitely a being I never want to run into again.
guide.RUIN.solar_ray.lore: I have purchased this spell tome from a Spell Broker as I have been unable to decipher its origin but I believe its siphoning energy from the sun.
guide.RUIN.storm_rift.boss_lore: I think I went a little overboard... The strength of the storm vortex was so strong, it ripped through space!
guide.RUIN.storm_rift.lore: I started experimenting with Shock spells by forming small storms in front of me. With all my new found knowledge, how powerful can I make that?
guide.RUIN.stormstrike.boss_lore: AHAHAHA I DID IT! By focusing my energy in front of me, I can release the current inside to fire out a lightning bolt
guide.RUIN.stormstrike.lore: The magic flowing inside me is fast, almost like an electric current in my veins. I think I have an idea for a new attack.
guide.SUMMONS.summon_undead.boss_lore: I took to a dimension scattered with graves and was immediately swarmed by hordes of undead monsters. I've never been more terrified in my life.
guide.SUMMONS.summon_undead.lore: I can't begin to imagine the amount of souls that are just lying around, waiting for their power to be harnessed.
guide.SUMMONS.summon_villager.boss_lore: I've seen few Iron Golems in my day, but what on Earth did I just witness? I barely got out of there, but the knowledge I gained will be invaluable.
guide.SUMMONS.summon_villager.lore: I'm not alone in this world. I've come across villages in my travels, but they are too far and wide to guarantee I can find them.
guide.SUMMONS.wild_mushroom.boss_lore: Why did I think going to the home of a notably durable fungi would be a good idea. It always knows where I am... Must be these damn spores.
guide.SUMMONS.wild_mushroom.lore: Fungi are some of the most resilient living organisms. If I can find a mushroom infested realm, just think of the power it could be hiding.
guide.TRANSFIGURATION.cobbled_hide.boss_: The things you can do with alchemy are out of this world! I learned to harden my own skin with magic, offering me the protection of armor without the drawbacks.
guide.TRANSFIGURATION.cobbled_hide.lore: Wearing a bunch of armor slows me down and it seems to also have a negative impact on my spell casting. Maybe I can manipulate my body to be more efficient.
guide.TRANSFIGURATION.dolphins_fin.boss_: The solution was staring me right in the face. Instead of utilizing Dolphin's, I can become the Dolphin myself! The vast oceans are now mine to explore!
guide.TRANSFIGURATION.dolphins_fin.lore: While I have plenty of means for land travel, I'm still lacking a way to quickly travel bodies of water without the aid of Dolphins...wait a second...
guide.TRANSFIGURATION.mystic_armor.boss_: Well, I was trying to make myself absorb their mana. While that didn't completely work, I have managed to reduce the impact of their spells.
guide.TRANSFIGURATION.mystic_armor.lore: Uh oh, seems like I have angered a few too many Magi. I'm trying to throw together whatever I can, hoping I can protect my self a little more consistently.
guide.TRANSFIGURATION.shadow_gate.boss_l: I think I got it! After experimenting with ender pearls, I found I can use them to rip open gateways temporarily. I have created a spell to keep these open for longer.
guide.TRANSFIGURATION.shadow_gate.lore: As my studies have advanced, I am finding myself needing to explore more biomes. I've found that teleportation could be quite useful.
guide.TRANSFIGURATION.stride.boss_lore: Well, I solved my problem with Transfiguration. You won't believe it, but by mixing the right ingredients, I can supercharge my body. Allowing my legs to work even faster!
guide.TRANSFIGURATION.stride.lore: I have been trying to gather ingredients for all of my alchemy rituals, but it's taking me too long to find everything. I need a faster way...
guide.basic.arcanthus: A magical flower found in small patches in flower fields, Arcanthus is the easiest way for a Magi to introduce oneself to the world of magic. Can be crafted into magic essence.
guide.basic.armor: Enchanted regalia that buffs certain spell stats from the corresponding path.
guide.basic.blurb: Welcome fellow Magi, to the world of Spellbound! I present to you the first in many books documenting the arcane. Let this book act as your guide, introducing you to the different paths of magic to follow, and the plethora of mysteries to be discovered.
guide.basic.choice_skills: ▪ Choice skills almost entirely change how a spell functions, giving Magi's the option to swap between different implementations of the same spell.
guide.basic.choice_spells: As spells level up, they can be upgraded to become even stronger and more unique to your playstyle. Certain upgrades changes how spells work entirely—these are called §lChoice Spells§r.
guide.basic.conditional_skills: ▪ Conditional skills require specific conditions to be met to either unlock or use.
guide.basic.deception: Deception is the path of illusions and trickery. Masters of the art of Deception make their moves from the shadows, striking when you least expect. It is said that there is a place beyond mortal reach, housing secrets for those determined enough to uncover them.
guide.basic.description1: The magical world of Spellbound puts an emphasis on your choices to craft your experience, rather than relying on RNG.
guide.basic.description2: Unlock powerful spells, each with their own set of unique upgrades. Fight dangerous foes in otherworldly dimensions. Explore the dark arts or become a peaceful saint. Choose your path.
guide.basic.divine: Divine is the path of light and darkness. Aid your allies and smite the undead, or curse your enemies and steal their life force. The Divine forces fuel your power, but beware. For every action taken, judgement will be passed.
guide.basic.guide_books: Guide Books are essential for any Magi, new or old. Within them contains all information relevant to its corresponding path. Some content includes:
guide.basic.guide_books6: Note: Not all content has been added yet
guide.basic.magic_essence: Magic Essence is the core of all magic items in this world, utilizing the magical properties of Arcanthus to enhance its host object.
guide.basic.mana_tear: As you and your spells grow stronger, the mana needed to cast them is increased. Mana Tears can be used to permanently increase mana reserves.
guide.basic.modifier_skills: ▪ Modifier skills give permanent buffs/debuffs to certain spell stats, such as duration, potency, or mana cost.
guide.basic.page_scraps1: Path books hold key information about spell acquisition and path mechanics, but are encrypted in a magical language and need a cipher to read.
guide.basic.page_scraps2: Page scraps can be obtained around the world through various actions, deciphering certain entries in a book.
guide.basic.page_scraps3: Explore the lands, interact with mobs, and be on the look out for clues to unlock every book entry.
guide.basic.path_items: Every path has a set of specific items that will help Magi's grow stronger: §lShards§r, §lStaves§r, and §lArmor§r
guide.basic.ruin: Ruin is the path of elemental energy, destruction and chaos. The Ruin path can be broken down into additional sub-paths: §lFire§r, §lFrost§r, and §lShock§r. Each path has a unique effect that is applied to targets after taking enough damage.
guide.basic.shards: Shards are special magic catalyst items that can be found underground, dropped from certain mobs, or earned from specific tasks.
guide.basic.skills1: Skills are upgrades unique to each spell that adds additional functionality to it. All spells have a total of 10 skill upgrades.
guide.basic.skills2: Skills are unlocked via Skill Points, which are earned every time you level up a spell. Spells can level up to a max level of 5, meaning only 5 of the 10 upgrades can be unlocked.
guide.basic.skills3: There are 3 special types of skills: §lModifier§r, §lConditional§r, and §lChoice§r skills.
guide.basic.spell_broker: Located in a secluded tower in the forest and sometimes seen roaming the lands is a shady fellow, the Spell Broker.
guide.basic.spell_broker1: Carrying spells he could only have obtained through suspicious means, the Broker seeks to trade things of magical value.
guide.basic.spell_mastery: All spells are locked under a Mastery Level. Path Mastery Level is increased by levelling up spells, which can be done through spell casting and harming/healing entities with your spells.
guide.basic.spell_paths1: All spells are broken up into 5 spell paths: §4Ruin§r, §2Transfiguration§r, §1Summons§r, §eDivine§r, and §9Deception§r
guide.basic.spell_tomes: To learn a spell, you must first obtain its Spell Tome. Spell Tomes cannot be found in dungeons or as common mob loot, but are instead acquired through certain tasks corresponding to its path.
guide.basic.staves: A Magi's Staff allows its user to better control the flow of magic, bestowing a special buff to spells of the corresponding path.
guide.basic.summons: Summons is the path creation. As a Summoner, bring forth allies from beyond the grave or other dimensions to fight in your stead by defeating them in combat. Befriend familiars to aid you in your journey.
guide.basic.transfiguration: Transfiguration is the path of alchemy and change. Offering a variety of utility and protection, Transfiguration spells are essential in almost all Magi's arsenal. Learn how to perform spells on an even grander scale through rituals.
guide.basic.workbench1: A Magi's Workbench is a Magi's most important tool for spell growth. This is where you can view, swap out, and upgrade your spells as you progress through the world.
guide.deception.acquisition1: How am I to learn this damn path when I can't even begin to find these books. I could ask around, but what if they lie? I must be cautious...
guide.deception.acquisition2: FINE! I caved in and bought some spells from a Spell Broker. But you can bet I'm going to try these on someone else first!
guide.deception.description1: Deceit, trickery, fraud... All words of power to fool those who would doubt you. Using this path of magic I will twist what people see, manipulating what they understand as truth.
guide.deception.description2: This discipline demands a new kind of sight—one that sees through the world's lies to weave falsehoods of my own
guide.deception.quote: Honor is a shackle. Break it.
guide.divine.cover_page: This book shall document my discoveries throughout my adventures into the arcane and how I can call upon divine forces to aid myself and allies and harm foes.
guide.divine.description1: The Divine Path is the discipline of miracles, drawing power from the absolute forces of not only Light, but Darkness. This magic is not learned—it is bestowed.
guide.divine.description2: To walk this path is to become a conduit for higher powers. Whether you seek to be a Saint of Mercy who shields the weak, or a Paladin of Darkness who has fallen to the forces of evil, this path demands action.
guide.divine.divine_action1: Guarded by the Valkyr, the Shrine is bound to the temple. Should I attempt to mine or displace the altar, the Valkyr’s wrath will be immediate. I may use the Shrine where it stands, but I am forbidden from taking it.
guide.divine.divine_action2:
Like the Valkyr, the shrine too seems to measure my Judgement. If my Judgement does not meet the specific requirement for a spell, the altar remains dormant—
denying me the power until my nature aligns with its intent.
guide.divine.divine_shrine1: The Divine Shrine is the heart of this magic, yet it functions unlike any other altar I have encountered. It does not desire materials; it desires proof.
guide.divine.divine_shrine2: I have learned that spells are not made, but granted. To acquire them, I must perform specific Divine Actions within the Shrine's presence.
guide.divine.divine_temple1: I have discovered these mysterious, looming structures along my travels. Scattered across the lands are Divine Temples, ancient structures built to worship the Divine.
guide.divine.judgement1: I used to think this magic was merely a tool, indifferent to the hand that wielded it. I was wrong. It is watching me.
guide.divine.judgement2: I noticed the shift recently. After spending days protecting the weak, my benevolent magic surged, becoming far more potent than before. Yet, out of curiosity, when I turned to cruelty, that warmth withered. In its place, my darker arts flared with a terrifying, violent heat.
guide.divine.judgement3: There is a hidden balance at play—a §lJudgement.
guide.divine.judgement4: It seems my soul is constantly being weighed. Acts of light tip the scales, amplifying my ability to preserve life but suffocating my ability to take it. Acts of darkness tip them back, fueling my darker arts while severing my connection to the light.
guide.divine.judgement5: This invisible score dictates everything. Forbidden knowledge remains locked to me until my nature aligns with its intent, and even the world itself seems to react to my standing. I must choose my path carefully. I cannot be both a Saint and a Monster. The Scales will not allow it.
guide.divine.quote: Faith is not spoken. It is proven.
guide.divine.valkyr1: They are not abandoned. Each is protected by a Valkyr, a sentinel of steel and light.
guide.divine.valkyr2: I realized my safety hung by a thread. These guardians serve the balance of Judgement. To the righteous, they are silent watchers. But had I approached with a heart stained by cruelty, I have no doubt the Valkyr would have cut me down the moment I crossed the threshold.
guide.ruin.build_up1: I've discovered that a single creatures body can only take so much of each element. When a target is unable to absorb more of an element, their body seems to react in a different way depending on the element. I'll keep experimenting and try to understand what exactly is happening.
guide.ruin.cover_page: This book shall document my discoveries throughout my adventures into the arcane and how I can bend it to my will to destroy my enemies by harnessing the powers of ruin.
guide.ruin.cryomancer_robes: Finally, some Frost robes to protect me from the cold! They were spread between igloos and abandoned shipwrecks.
guide.ruin.description1: The destructive Path of Ruin, channelling the forces that hold the world together and twisting them to tear the world apart.
guide.ruin.description2: To use this path to its fullest is to channel all your mana into pure elemental power, ripping through anyone who stands in your path or doubts your strength. Disregarding whatever damage you may do to the world around you.
guide.ruin.fire:
§lFire§r
Fire is the first of the elements I have explored. It appears to have the highest damage and destructive output of the three, being able to set targets aflame.
guide.ruin.fire_status:
§lFire§r
Fire energy explodes out the target, dealing massive damage and setting fire to the area around the target.
guide.ruin.frost:
§lFrost§r
Like the other side of a coin, Frost is the opposite of Fire. this one seems to affect living creatures ability to perform actions massively slowing any thing affected by it.
guide.ruin.frost_status:
§lFrost§r
Freezes foes solid, stopping them from performing any actions temporarily.
guide.ruin.path_items: I have discovered elemental attuned robes and staves throughout the world. As far as I can tell, these staves act as a catalyst for their respective element, causing those who I target to reach Elemental Overload faster. The robes, on the other hand, seems to increase the potency of my spells when I wear the full set.
guide.ruin.portals1: When I draw from this source of magic, I can feel others tug back at it. I believe there are ancient beings residing in their own realms that have learned to bend these elements to their will.
guide.ruin.portals2: I aim to find the gateways to these ancient beings' realms so I can find how they are twisting the elements and create new ways of expressing my own magic.
guide.ruin.portals3: While exploring I have found a few gateways, but they seem to all be locked. Unfortunately, the way to make keystones has been long forgotten. I'l have to buy my ruin spells from Spell Brokers for now.
guide.ruin.pyromancer_robes: Exploring the nether, I spotted these robes hot to the touch. With this kind of heat, I imagine Fire spells won't get through very well.
guide.ruin.quote: Peace is a lie. There is only energy.
guide.ruin.shock:
§lShock§r
The final element, Shock, possesses the most chaotic and rapid nature of the three, chaining lightning and creating storm clouds at will. From what I've gathered, the shock can disrupt some enemies—hindering their spell casting abilities.
guide.ruin.shock_status:
§lShock§r
Targets access to the arcane is disrupted, silencing them temporarily and draining their mana.
guide.ruin.stormweaver_robes: Within a trial chamber, I have found these robes belonging to a long forgotten Stormweaver. These robes resist Shock damage to a degree.
guide.ruin.subpaths1: Ruin manipulates the power holding the world together, but there isn't just one force doing this.
guide.ruin.subpaths2: I believe there are 3 primordial elements this power consists of: §lFire§r, §lFrost§r and §lShock§r. They all seem to have a different impact on both the world and my magic. If I focus my studies on one Sub-Path, it's possible I could enhance my control over one of these forces exponentially.
guide.summon.affinities1: As my familiar has reached milestones in its bond with me its began displaying abilities, even sharing those abilities with me at times.
guide.summon.affinities2: Upon them reaching their maximum strength I have even figured out a way to trigger a rebirth with the resonance stone, resetting them to how they were when I found them, but stronger.
guide.summon.bond1: These familiars aren't just brainless drones like my other summons, they are conscious with thoughts.
guide.summon.bond2: After exploring more with my familiars, there has been a bond developed between us and as this has grown we have both grown in strength.
guide.summon.description1: Summoning magic... dragging creatures from the darkest of realms and forcing them to fight on your behalf. Only the strong willed can use this power.
guide.summon.description2: To harness this source of magic, a creature must first be defeated to understand its power. But that first requires reaching into these twisted realms where they reside, and hunting these powerful entities.
guide.summon.dimensions1: The most powerful creatures to exist lord over their own realms. If I am able to find a way to access these dimensions, then I can learn how to control these beasts and use their powers for myself.
guide.summon.dimensions2: I know I can't be the first one to try this I plan to search for any potential portals left by others.
guide.summon.familiars1: While travelling through the different dimensions I have been hearing voices, whispers even. It's almost as if the magic is attempting to communicate with me directly.
guide.summon.familiars2: I think these sounds are coming from pure arcane energy that I have imbued with life force through my summoning.
guide.summon.portal_activation1: After focusing more of my studies on End portals, I have realised that I need something else. Maybe I can use a block to focus on to locate their destination.
guide.summon.portal_activation2: I believe that if I can create just a single summoning stone adjusted to a specific dimension, I could open a gateway by placing it in the middle of my portal and activating it.
guide.summon.resonance: I have created a Resonance Stone that has enabled me to make contact with these creatures that have been calling out.
guide.summon.summoning_portal1: I have come across a crumbling structure with these summoning stones arranged like an End portal. They seem to be activated with Magic Essence.
guide.summon.summoning_stone1: Within the nether I have found some abandoned forges. Within the rubble was this recipe for a summoning stone.
guide.summon.types:
In my studies I have found each familiar seems to be very good when applied in the correct situations.

From here on, I shall refer to these familiars as being based on §lCombat§r, §lUtility§r or a §lHybrid§r, depending on where their strengths lie.
guide.summon.valid_portals: Well, after a series of trial and error, I have found that these focused summoning stones must be very specific.
guide.summon.valid_portals1: When I am able to find a way to create a new focused stone I will be sure to note it down in this book, along with any information regarding the spells I can draw out from the dimension.
guide.summon.whistle: After communing with the creatures I have fabricated a whistle allowing me to summon one of the beings as a familiar to fight by my side.
guide.summons.cover_page: This book shall document my discoveries throughout my adventures into the arcane and how I can increase my strength through numbers with the rites of summoning.
guide.summons.quote: Death is not the end. It's the beginning of recruitment.
guide.transfiguration.chalk: I discovered some runic marking on the walls in the caves. I don't understand what they mean, but it's almost as if I felt magic flowing through the text. I'll write some down for later.
guide.transfiguration.cover_page: This book shall document my discoveries throughout my adventures into the arcane and how I can manipulate the world around me through the study of transfiguration.
guide.transfiguration.description1: Matter, equivalent exchange, logic—the Transfiguration Path requires great understanding of these concepts. It's more than magic—it's a science.
guide.transfiguration.description2: To truly master this path is to reject the world as it appears. Stone can become water, iron can become gold, and a formidable enemy can become a harmless sheep. But to rewrite the laws of physics, you must understand them first.
guide.transfiguration.display: I've been chiseling away at these old magic stones for hours. My body aches, but at least I have a way to store my collection of materials
guide.transfiguration.pedestal: I infused a little bit of my magic into an rickety table I had lying around in preparation for my studies. And now I have it—the heart of the altar, where the magic happens.
guide.transfiguration.quote: Reality is not a rule. It is a suggestion
guide.transfiguration.ritual_talisman: I have everything in place to begin my experiment, but nothing is happening. Maybe I need a catalyst? I should be wary—if it isn't strong enough, it could be a waste.
guide.transfiguration.rituals1: Alchemy, the foundation of everything I do. Whether I am extracting a new spell formula or manipulating my environment, the process is the same: arrange the geometry, balance the components, and force the transmutation.
guide.transfiguration.rituals2: The apparatus appears to consists of a central pedestal surrounded by display stands, with each tier increasing the displays and height needed.
guide.transfiguration.robes: Continuing on with my experimentation, I have succeeded in designing a set of robes. The fabric traps some of the residual magical energy lost from casting, increasing the duration of my Transfiguration spells while wearing them.
guide.transfiguration.rune_circuit: If I connect the displays in a ring with these runic symbols I found, the structure acts as a circuit, with the items on displays defining the properties of the ritual.
guide.transfiguration.stave: In my studies, I've theorized a specialized catalyst that can be tuned to my Transfiguration spells. One that acts as a lens, extending the reach of my magic. To forge this, I must devise a new ritual. If my theories are correct, I'll document the results here.
healing_blossom.decorate_shrine.lore: As I grow in tune with the divine, I can feel a strong presence of magic emanating from Overworld flora. I should collect as much as I can to study.
healing_blossom.decorate_shrine.name: Gardener
healing_blossom.grow_ambrosia_bush.lore: It seems bees fail to see me as an enemy after I've eaten this Ambrosia dish. While helpful, it's not really my taste. I'll just give some to the bees since they seem to like it.
healing_blossom.grow_ambrosia_bush.name: Living Pollen
healing_blossom.purify_wither_rose.lore: I can sense a sinister aura coming from this black flower. As a servant of the Divine, it is my duty to cleanse it!
healing_blossom.purify_wither_rose.name: Life From Death
healing_touch.bless_shrine.lore: This shrine I found in the temple seems to resonate with my every action—good or bad. I think as long as I take good care of it, I can become even stronger!
healing_touch.bless_shrine.name: Caretaker
healing_touch.heal_mob_to_full.lore: I'm still rather new to this whole healing magic thing, it might be best to start off small. I wonder if I can catch any animals to practice on?
healing_touch.heal_mob_to_full.name: Shepherd
healing_touch.use_blessed_bandages.lore: This world is harsh... ferocious wildlife and undead monsters are running rampant. It will be a serious problem without a way to heal my wounds in a pinch
healing_touch.use_blessed_bandages.name: Field Medic
painting.spellbound.deception.author: PiediLerci
painting.spellbound.deception.title: Deception
painting.spellbound.divine.author: PiediLerci
painting.spellbound.divine.title: Divine
painting.spellbound.fire.author: PiediLerci
painting.spellbound.fire.title: Fire
painting.spellbound.fish.author: PiediLerci
painting.spellbound.fish.title: Fish
painting.spellbound.frog.author: PiediLerci
painting.spellbound.frog.title: Frog
painting.spellbound.nun.author: PiediLerci
painting.spellbound.nun.title: Nun
painting.spellbound.ruin.author: PiediLerci
painting.spellbound.ruin.title: Ruin
painting.spellbound.snowy_lampion.author: PiediLerci

ritual.spellbound.create_cobbled_hide.de: Creates a Cobbled Hide spell tome
ritual.spellbound.create_dolphins_fin.de: Creates a Dolphin's Fin spell tome
ritual.spellbound.create_mystic_armor.de: Creates a Mystic Armor spell tome
ritual.spellbound.create_shadow_gate.des: Creates a Shadow Gate spell tome
siphon.kill_villager.lore: The voices, they are telling me things. These Villagers are just as dangerous as any undead. I must defend myself.
siphon.kill_villager.name: Murderer
skill.description.spellbound.accelerated: Instantly restores a small portion of hunger to the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.afterglow: Enemies hit are marked with a glow. Marked enemies take extra fire damage.
skill.description.spellbound.aftershock_: If Flame Jet is recast within a short duration, its damage is increased.
skill.description.spellbound.air_bubble: Converts the regeneration to air supply.
skill.description.spellbound.alternating: The discharge has a small chance to instantly kill the target. Does not work on target with more than twice the caster's current health. On failure, the caster takes damage proportional to their max health.
skill.description.spellbound.amplify: Electric Charge can be Channeled seconds to increase the damage
skill.description.spellbound.aqua_tread: Gain the ability to walk on water.
skill.description.spellbound.aquatic_das: Recast to perform an instant dash forward through the water.
skill.description.spellbound.arcane_feed: If the target runs out of mana, they are Silenced and take damage instead.
skill.description.spellbound.arcane_veng: Increases attack damage after the caster blocks an attack.
skill.description.spellbound.auto_target: Homing Missile no longer needs a direct target and will track the nearest enemy to the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.bait_and_sw: Enemies passing through a portal take damage to health and mana.
skill.description.spellbound.bedrock_bas: Falling below a certain HP threshold grants the caster temporary invulnerability until the next hit, reducing spell duration.
skill.description.spellbound.blasphemy: Inflicts Disease buildup on the attacker when struck by melee.
skill.description.spellbound.blessing: Grants a small regeneration buff to the target.
skill.description.spellbound.blinding_li: Enemies hit by the beam are blinded.
skill.description.spellbound.blinding_mi: Enemies that damage the decoy are blinded.
skill.description.spellbound.blink: Passing through the portals increases the caster's movement speed.
skill.description.spellbound.bloom: The blossom now activates immediately after casting.
skill.description.spellbound.boulderback: Retaliate a spray of gravel when struck by melee damage, reflecting a portion of the damage back to the attacker.
skill.description.spellbound.bountiful: Villagers killed by enemies have a chance to drop a random trade.
skill.description.spellbound.burning_adh: Enemies struck by Sticky Bomb take additional damage to their armor.
skill.description.spellbound.burst_of_li: Instantly heals the caster upon activation.
skill.description.spellbound.cats_agilit: In cat form, the spirit gains increased movement speed.
skill.description.spellbound.chain_react: The discharge applies Electric Charge to all nearby enemies, including the caster. The secondary charge is discharged immediately.
skill.description.spellbound.chaotic_sha: Detonating one crystal will detonate others in the area.
skill.description.spellbound.charged_atm: Decreases the mana cost of Shock spells for a duration.
skill.description.spellbound.charged_bla: Fireball can be Charged, increasing its size, explosion radius, and damage per charge.
skill.description.spellbound.charged_rif: Each warp between portals charges the storm, increasing shock damage.
skill.description.spellbound.chill: Crystal passively emits a freezing aura, dealing frost damage every second.
skill.description.spellbound.cleansing_t: Removes a random negative effect from the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.cluster_str: Increases the max charges of Volatile Cluster
skill.description.spellbound.combat_perc: Chance to dodge a melee attack.
skill.description.spellbound.concentrate: Continuously hitting the same target increases the damage of Solar Ray.
skill.description.spellbound.confusion: Creates a Doppelgänger at the cast location.
skill.description.spellbound.conjure_cat: Summons a totem spirit for 60 seconds. It changes between warrior form (fighting stance) and cat form (healing stance).
skill.description.spellbound.consecrated: Allies within a short distance of a blessed target receive half the benefits.
skill.description.spellbound.corpse_expl: Recast on an undead summon to explode it, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and healing the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.counter_mag: Gain a magic shield that negates any spell cast on the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.crimson_pac: Zombified Piglin deal bonus damage to any target that recently damaged the caster and negate Fire Damage.
skill.description.spellbound.crystal_ech: After detonation, the crystal temporarily reforms in its original location (once per crystal).
skill.description.spellbound.curse_of_pa: The target takes extra physical damage.
skill.description.spellbound.curse_of_su: The target takes extra magic damage.
skill.description.spellbound.cursed_rune: Place a rune at the target location. Enemies who step on it take a small amount of magic damage.
skill.description.spellbound.darkness_pr: Portals can be spawned in any light level.
skill.description.spellbound.diamond_hid: Additionally increases the caster's armor and gain spell damage reduction.
skill.description.spellbound.disarm: Chance to disarm the target each damage tick.
skill.description.spellbound.disoriented: After the swap, the target gets dizzy and temporarily deals less damage.
skill.description.spellbound.displacemen: A single portal can now teleport enemies to a random location.
skill.description.spellbound.distant_fli: Increases the range to the caster's full cast range.
skill.description.spellbound.divine_bala: Increases the duration and the mana cost.
skill.description.spellbound.dolphins_fi: Increases the caster's swim speed and water movement efficiency. Also reduces the caster's water speed reduction.
skill.description.spellbound.dragon_hide: Additionally increases the caster's armor and gain fire resistance.
skill.description.spellbound.dual_destin: Can now deploy an additional portal. Order of travel goes by order placed.
skill.description.spellbound.echolocatio: Recast to emit a sonar ping, highlighting all entities in the water within range.
skill.description.spellbound.eldritch_in: Restores caster to half health if below a certain HP threshold.
skill.description.spellbound.electric_ch: Sneakily apply an electric charge to the target. Recast to discharge.
skill.description.spellbound.equilibrium: When the caster gets hit, reflect damage scaling with health back to the attacker.
skill.description.spellbound.event_horiz: When a target is warped, they pull nearby enemies towards the warp field.
skill.description.spellbound.explosive_a: Increases the explosion radius of all Fireball variants.
skill.description.spellbound.explosive_b: Each lava bomb explodes on impact.
skill.description.spellbound.expulsion_b: Flame Jet sends enemies flying in the opposite direction of the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.expunge: Removes a spell from the target's knowledge.
skill.description.spellbound.extended_gr: Increases the duration and amplifies the regeneration effect.
skill.description.spellbound.feral_fury: In cat form, the spirit gains increase attack damage and speed.
skill.description.spellbound.fireball: Launches a ball of fire that explodes on impact
skill.description.spellbound.flame_geyse: Flame Jet originates from the position the caster points at, increasing the jet's length.
skill.description.spellbound.flame_infer: Flame Jet fires in a ring around the caster, dealing reduced damage.
skill.description.spellbound.flame_jet: Releases a short, concentrated burst of fire in front of the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.fleetfooted: Nearby allies gain movement speed while near the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.flicker: Instantly teleports the caster half of their cast range. Can be used directionally.
skill.description.spellbound.flourishing: If the caster's health reaches full, the excess health is converted into mana.
skill.description.spellbound.flower_fiel: Allies receive half the healing from the blossom.
skill.description.spellbound.forced_warp: Upon being warped, targets are launched out of the portal with a high velocity, potentially dealing damage on impact.
skill.description.spellbound.frigid_blas: Enemies hit by the blast are significantly slowed.
skill.description.spellbound.frozen_shra: The crystal now sends out ice shards that deal extra frost damage.
skill.description.spellbound.fungal_harv: When 3 mushrooms are active, gain increased mana regeneration.
skill.description.spellbound.galloping_s: Base spell speed is increased permanently.
skill.description.spellbound.glacial_imp: Recast with a Frozen Shard to mark a crystal. Marked crystal's explosion applies Frozen and Permafrost to enemies hit.
skill.description.spellbound.gluttony: If the caster is at full health, the spell restores hunger instead.
skill.description.spellbound.gravity_shi: Exiting the portal launches entities in the air, applying slow falling to the caster and allies, if applicable.
skill.description.spellbound.hall_of_mir: Recast to swap places with the decoy, ending the invisibility.
skill.description.spellbound.hall_of_the: Upon death, Skeletons fall into a pile of bones. If not hit with Fire Damage, they come back to life.
skill.description.spellbound.hammerhead: Underwater mining speed reduction is negated.
skill.description.spellbound.harvest: The caster links to all nearby enemies, draining from them simultaneously.
skill.description.spellbound.healing_blo: Plants a divine blossom. After blooming, the blossom heals the caster when nearby.
skill.description.spellbound.healing_lig: Allies hit by the ray are healed.
skill.description.spellbound.healing_str: Each tick restores extra health scaling with the caster's missing mana.
skill.description.spellbound.healing_tou: Heals the caster for a short duration.
skill.description.spellbound.healing_win: The blossom now follows the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.hidden_rune: The Rune is invisible to everyone but the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.high_voltag: Recast with a storm shard to instantly stun the target.
skill.description.spellbound.hypothermia: Enemies hit by the explosion have their frost resistance reduced.
skill.description.spellbound.ice_shard: Recast on a crystal: destroy it to make it drop a frozen shard.
skill.description.spellbound.ignition_bu: Flame Jet explodes at the end of its range at max charge, dealing extra Fire damage.
skill.description.spellbound.implosion: Recast while targeting a portal with a storm shard to detonate the portal, applying Stormstrike to anyone in the area.
skill.description.spellbound.inferno_cor: After the eruption ends, the volcano drops a Smoldering Shard.
skill.description.spellbound.infused_sto: Receiving spell damage increases mana regeneration.
skill.description.spellbound.iron_hide: Additionally increases the caster's armor and gain projectile damage reduction.
skill.description.spellbound.iron_maiden: Attacks from the target deal less damage to the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.iron_man: Consume a Smoldering Shard. Flame Jet can be channeled to continuously propel the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.jet_engine: Propels the caster in the direction they are facing, dealing Fire damage to enemies behind.
skill.description.spellbound.jet_stabili: Flame Jet can be cast while walking or sprinting.
skill.description.spellbound.kelp_veil: Remaining motionless underwater grants the caster invisibility until the next movement or action.
skill.description.spellbound.lava_flow: Lava bombs turn into lava pools on impact.
skill.description.spellbound.lingering_f: After detonation, the crystal leaves a damaging mist behind, dealing frost damage and significant frost build up.
skill.description.spellbound.living_fung: Recast on a mushroom to spawn a Mini Mushroom minion.
skill.description.spellbound.living_shad: After the swap, the caster remains invisible and leaves behind a decoy.
skill.description.spellbound.look_over_h: The caster no longer teleports, but immediately turns invisible, sending a decoy in a chosen direction.
skill.description.spellbound.loyal_prote: Spawn an Iron Golem alongside the Villager.
skill.description.spellbound.mage_wreck: Drains mana from enemies who step on the rune.
skill.description.spellbound.magic_poiso: Mana is reduced for each active spell purged.
skill.description.spellbound.magnetic_fi: The vortex has twice the pull strength. Enemies caught in the field have their armor reduced.
skill.description.spellbound.mana_sponge: Absorbs a portion of the mana cost if attacked by a spell.
skill.description.spellbound.masonry_war: Automatically block a portion of spell damage every few seconds.
skill.description.spellbound.mermaids_ta: Increases the swim speed and water speed reduction bonuses.
skill.description.spellbound.mirror_curs: Summons a Doppelgänger of the target
skill.description.spellbound.molten_core: Fully Charged Fireballs from Charged Blast pierce enemies.
skill.description.spellbound.momentum: For each second travelled, the caster gains additional attack speed.
skill.description.spellbound.motion_sick: Warped enemies have their movement, attack, and mining speed reduced.
skill.description.spellbound.mystic_armo: Reduces incoming spell damage, scaling with Path level.
skill.description.spellbound.natures_dom: Each active mushroom increases the spell's damage.
skill.description.spellbound.natures_tou: Instantly restores a small portion of health to the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.nine_lives: If the spirit is killed, it will instantly revive with 50% health (only once per summoning).
skill.description.spellbound.nullificati: Removes a random enchantment from the target's equipment
skill.description.spellbound.oak_blessin: Temporarily increases armor if the caster's health drops below a certain threshold.
skill.description.spellbound.observant: The target is outlined to the caster while invisible.
skill.description.spellbound.ocean_dwell: Gain the ability to breathe underwater.
skill.description.spellbound.open_invita: Anyone can pass through the portals.
skill.description.spellbound.orbital_she: Recast while targeting a portal with a shard to mark a portal. Marked portals will orbit around the origin.
skill.description.spellbound.oscillation: Increases the discharge damage for each storm shard in the caster's inventory. All shards are destroyed on discharge.
skill.description.spellbound.overflowing: Grants damage reduction to the target if the relevant resource is full.
skill.description.spellbound.overgrowth: While at full health, each heal tick increases the caster's max health.
skill.description.spellbound.overheal: If health and hunger are full, Siphon temporarily increases the caster's max health.
skill.description.spellbound.overheat: Continuous use of Solar Ray causes the caster to emit intense heat, dealing fire damage to nearby enemies.
skill.description.spellbound.overpower: Gain the ability to slowly move while casting Solar Ray.
skill.description.spellbound.parasitic_f: Enemies hit by a mushroom explosion are taunted.
skill.description.spellbound.parasitic_l: When the target casts a spell, the caster receives a portion of the mana cost.
skill.description.spellbound.petal_shiel: The caster gains extra armor when near the blossom.
skill.description.spellbound.phantom_lur: Nearby enemies are taunted towards the decoy.
skill.description.spellbound.piezoelectr: If killed by Electric Charge, the enemy drops a storm shard.
skill.description.spellbound.planar_defl: Reflects a portion of melee damage taken back to the attacker.
skill.description.spellbound.pod_leader: Nearby allies gain the swim speed benefits.
skill.description.spellbound.poison_esse: If a target dies to a mushroom, the spell temporarily gains potency.
skill.description.spellbound.power_of_th: Solar Ray deals more damage during the day.
skill.description.spellbound.primal_resi: In cat form, the spirit's regenerate +5% of its max health.
skill.description.spellbound.proliferati: Mini Mushroom minions can be bonemealed to spawn a Giant Mushroom.
skill.description.spellbound.pulsation: Chance to paralyze the target each damage tick.
skill.description.spellbound.purge: Deals extra damage to summoned targets, scaling with the caster's mana.
skill.description.spellbound.purge_magic: Stops all of the targets active spells.
skill.description.spellbound.purifying_w: Removes a random negative effect from the target.
skill.description.spellbound.quick_recha: The caster receives mana any time someone passes through a portal.
skill.description.spellbound.quick_sprin: Speed is additionally increased by a short amount at the start of the spell.
skill.description.spellbound.radio_waves: Purge Magic is now cast in an AoE.
skill.description.spellbound.rapid_fire: Fire a rapid stream of 3 smaller Fireballs.
skill.description.spellbound.reach: Double the range of the portals
skill.description.spellbound.rebirth: If the caster takes fatal damage near the blossom, half of their health is automatically restored.
skill.description.spellbound.refraction: Restores mana back to the caster when the target takes Shock damage from sources other than Stormstrike.
skill.description.spellbound.residual_di: Targets hit with Purge Magic have reduced cast chance.
skill.description.spellbound.reversal: After the swap, the caster can recast to swap back with the target.
skill.description.spellbound.riders_resi: All movement benefits are applied to mounts.
skill.description.spellbound.savage_leap: In warrior form, the spirit can perform a leap forward, knocking back all enemies.
skill.description.spellbound.shadow_chai: The spell can now affect an additional target. Swapping order is in the order of targets affected.
skill.description.spellbound.shadow_esca: When the caster enters the portal at low health, they gain invisibility after exiting.
skill.description.spellbound.shadow_fein: The decoy can move a short distance in a random direction.
skill.description.spellbound.shadow_gate: Deploy 2 shadow portals (must be in a low light level), allowing passage in both directions with 50 blocks.
skill.description.spellbound.shadow_step: After the swap, the caster's movement speed is increased.
skill.description.spellbound.shadowbond: Caster and target gain invisibility. When the invisibility is broken, the caster and target swap places.
skill.description.spellbound.shared_boon: Allows Blessing to target two allies within a small radius if cast near another target.
skill.description.spellbound.shark_attac: Passing through an enemy with Aquatic Dash deals minor damage and knockback.
skill.description.spellbound.shatter_ski: Recast to explode the rocky shell, dealing damage proportional to the armor bonus to nearby enemies.
skill.description.spellbound.shattering_: Creates a crystal of ice. Cast again to detonate it, dealing damage to nearby enemies.
skill.description.spellbound.shock_facto: Deals extra damage scaling with the caster's mana.
skill.description.spellbound.show_me_the: Each Villager grants the caster a unique passive.
skill.description.spellbound.silent_exch: After the swap, the target is Silenced.
skill.description.spellbound.silent_step: The caster gives off no sound after teleporting.
skill.description.spellbound.siphon: Channel on to link to a target. While linked, the caster gains a portion of the target's health.
skill.description.spellbound.slipstream: Continuously swimming increases the swim speed bonus and grants immunity to Mining Fatigue.
skill.description.spellbound.snare: After the swap, the target is rooted.
skill.description.spellbound.sneak_attac: After the swap, the caster's first attack within a short duration deals more damage.
skill.description.spellbound.solar_bore: The end of the Solar Ray opposite of the caster periodically explodes, setting the ground ablaze.
skill.description.spellbound.solar_burst: Both ends of the beam periodically release a small Solar Burst that deals additional fire damage.
skill.description.spellbound.solar_ray: Fire a beam of fire that deals continuous damage.
skill.description.spellbound.sonar_blast: Recast to emit a conical wave of force in the direction the caster is facing.
skill.description.spellbound.soul_rechar: Restores the caster to full health if below a certain HP threshold, consuming a flux shard in the caster's inventory.
skill.description.spellbound.soul_tap: You now drain mana instead of health (mana is not absorbed).
skill.description.spellbound.stampede: You can charge through enemies, knocking them back and dealing magic damage.
skill.description.spellbound.static_shoc: Hitting a block now creates a small explosion that applies Stormstrike to anyone it hits.
skill.description.spellbound.stealth_tac: In cat form, the spirit will turn invisible for 7 seconds if its health drops below 25%. 1 min. cooldown.
skill.description.spellbound.step_into_s: The caster gains invisibility after teleporting.
skill.description.spellbound.sticky_bomb: Fireballs stick to surfaces or enemies, detonating after a short duration.
skill.description.spellbound.storm_calle: Generate a cloud above both portals that discharge lightning periodically dealing shock damage.
skill.description.spellbound.storm_fury: The vortex doubles in size and damage.
skill.description.spellbound.storm_rift: Creates a storm portal. If two portals are active, those approaching either get warped across and take shock damage to health and mana.
skill.description.spellbound.storm_shard: If the target dies while affected by Stormstrike, the caster is awarded a Storm Shard.
skill.description.spellbound.storm_surge: If killed by Electric Charge, mana is restored to the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.stormstrike: Send out a bolt of lightning that charges a target
skill.description.spellbound.sublime_bea: Periodically restores health scaling with the caster's armor.
skill.description.spellbound.summon_unde: Summons a Zombie to fight for the caster.
skill.description.spellbound.summon_vill: Summons a Villager without a profession, scaling with charge.
skill.description.spellbound.sunshine: Doubles the range of Solar Ray.
skill.description.spellbound.supercharge: Increases the potency of Shock spells if the target dies while affected by Stormstrike.
skill.description.spellbound.superconduc: Decreases target's shock resistance on discharge.
skill.description.spellbound.swift_shado: Can be cast while walking or sprinting.
skill.description.spellbound.synthesis: If a target dies to a mushroom, the casting cost of the spell is temporarily decreased.
skill.description.spellbound.thin_ice: Enemies that walk near the crystal will instantly trigger the detonation.
skill.description.spellbound.thorny_vine: Enemies within the range of the blossom take magic damage.
skill.description.spellbound.totemic_arm: In warrior form, the spirit receives an armor buff that reduces physical damage by 25%.
skill.description.spellbound.totemic_bon: The caster receives a portion of the spirit's healing while in cat form.
skill.description.spellbound.turbo_charg: Flame Jet can be charged. The longer the charge, the longer the length of the jet and damage dealt.
skill.description.spellbound.turbulence_: If Flame Jet is recast within a short duration, its range is increased.
skill.description.spellbound.twin_spirit: The caster gains the ability to summon a second spirit, allowing for two spirits to fight simultaneously - one in warrior form, the other in cat form.
skill.description.spellbound.unleashed_s: If killed by Electric Charge, the target will explode, damaging nearby enemies.
skill.description.spellbound.unrelenting: The link can persist through walls/blocks for a short duration before breaking.
skill.description.spellbound.unwanted_gu: Enemies that pass through a portal have their attack and spell damage reduced.
skill.description.spellbound.uplifting_c: If the target takes a fatal blow, they are revived. The caster takes half their current HP in damage.
skill.description.spellbound.vanishing_c: Teleports the target away from the location.
skill.description.spellbound.verdant_ren: Cleanses all negative effects from the caster
skill.description.spellbound.volatile_cl: Fireball can be Charged, increasing the number of Fireballs shot per charge.
skill.description.spellbound.volcano: Create a volcanic eruption that spits out 8 lava bombs per second for 10 seconds.
skill.description.spellbound.warriors_ro: In warrior form, the spirit can let out a roar that increases ally attack damage by 15% for 10 seconds.
skill.description.spellbound.wild_mushro: Plants a wild mushroom at the target location, periodically expelling magic spores, dealing damage to nearby enemies.
skill.description.spellbound.withering: The target suffers Slowness II while being siphoned.
spellbound.affinity.description.blood_ma: Blood loss in proximity of familiar grants summoner +10% spell potency.
spellbound.affinity.description.blood_th: Foes inflicted with blood loss take +10% damage from familiar.
spellbound.affinity.description.feline_p: Familiars first attack will be a pounce with increased attack range.
spellbound.affinity.description.magma_di: Magma cubes have a chance to drop frog lights.
spellbound.affinity.description.murky_ha: Summoner gains +10% spell potency in swamps.
spellbound.affinity.description.nine_liv: When the familiar dies it revives with 20% max health. (5 minute cooldown)
spellbound.affinity.description.submerge: Increases familiar damage and regeneration after being submerged in water.
spellbound.familiars.tooltip.rebirths1: Familiars can be rebirthed at bond level 5.
spellbound.familiars.tooltip.rebirths2: This will reset skills but buffs stats.
summon.acquisition.description: Use the keystone below to access the boss's dimension.
summon.acquisition.summon_undead.lore: One zombie may be weak, but a horde of them can be devastating...
summon.acquisition.summon_villager.lore: If I can't find the village, I'll just have to bring the village to me...
summon.acquisition.wild_mushroom.lore: Come to think of it, it's rare to see a single mushroom on its own...
